campaign.title: Como avaliar reputação de marca artesanal

briefing.interpretation: The strategy focuses on building consumer trust by showcasing the meticulous craftsmanship and quality indicators of the amigurumi. By placing the product in a professional artisanal setting, we visually communicate the 'reputation' aspect through high-end presentation and attention to detail.
briefing.identifiedProduct: Handmade crochet amigurumi toy with yarn texture, blue skin, and a turtle-like shell.
briefing.visualDirection: The professional aesthetic is achieved through a minimalist craft studio setting, utilizing shallow depth of field and high-end studio lighting to emphasize the 'premium' nature of the handmade work.
suggestedElements: premium gift box with silk ribbon

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Main header image showing the product as a masterpiece of craftsmanship.
channelRecommendations.prompt: Stunning horizontal header photography of The [PRODUCT FINGERPRINT], centered on a clean white oak artisan table, a blank elegant hangtag attached with twine, soft natural studio lighting, high resolution, professional product shot for a brand reputation guide.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Macro-focused slide showing texture and stitch quality.
channelRecommendations.prompt: Professional toy photography of The [PRODUCT FINGERPRINT], a close-up macro shot focusing on the perfect yarn stitches and the white-trimmed shell, soft studio lighting, pastel bokeh background, 8k resolution, emphasizing handmade quality.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Centralized vertical framing for a 'quality inspection' narrative.
channelRecommendations.prompt: Dynamic vertical shot of The [PRODUCT FINGERPRINT] placed inside a luxury open gift box on a professional craft counter, gentle hands adjusting the white trim, soft lighting, depth of field, 8k, vibrant colors.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Lifestyle studio shot emphasizing trust and brand value.
channelRecommendations.prompt: Professional studio shot of The [PRODUCT FINGERPRINT] next to a small, textless gold seal of quality on a clean surface, minimalist artisanal workshop background, soft shadows, warm professional lighting.

Wide horizontal composition of The [PRODUCT FINGERPRINT] on a high-end minimalist desk next to a professional designer's sketchbook and a soft-focus measuring tape, symbolizing the standard of artisanal reputation, clean professional aesthetic, high-end photography.
